articles.title: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
articles.summary: OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month.

articles.title: ChatGPT has a new $100 per month Pro subscription
articles.summary: OpenAI has announced a new version of its ChatGPT Pro subscription that costs $100 per month. The new Pro tier offers "5x more" usage of its Codex coding tool than the $20 per month Plus subscription and "is best for longer, high-effort Codex sessions," OpenAI says. The company is introducing the new tier as it […]

articles.title: Amazon CEO takes aim at Nvidia, Intel, Starlink, more in annual shareholder letter
articles.summary: Andy Jassy's annual shareholder letter reads something like a diss track to a wide range of competitors as he defends spending $200 billion in capex.

articles.title: Final 2 days to save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket
articles.summary: Ticket discounts of up to $500 will end tomorrow, April 10, at 11:59 p.m. PT. After that, prices for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 go up again. Miss this, and you’ll be paying more for the same access to one of the most anticipated tech events of the year. Register now to lock in these savings.

articles.title: The AI industry’s race for profits is now existential
articles.summary: Today on Decoder, let’s talk about the looming AI monetization cliff, and whether some of the biggest companies in the space can become real, profitable businesses before they careen right off it. articles.title: Poke makes using AI agents as easy as sending a text
articles.summary: Poke brings AI agents to everyday users via text message by handling tasks and automations without complex setup, apps, or technical know-how.

articles.title: AWS boss explains why investing billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI is an OK conflict
articles.summary: AWS has an ingrained culture of handling competition, he explained, because the cloud giant also competes with its partners.
